title: Evangelion Unit
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Unit-??             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Apr 09, 2008 12:51 am BrikHaus wrote: Mine would be a giant Ornette.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Apr 09, 2008 1:05 am HA HA HA HA! THAT IS SO FULL OF WIN! I had a feeling something like that would come up.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Apr 09, 2008 4:33 am Epic hair is epic

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Apr 09, 2008 7:34 am SAVED!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Apr 09, 2008 10:04 am He really dwarfs that prog knife. Best. Photoshop. Ever.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Apr 09, 2008 10:40 am BrikHaus wrote: Best. Photoshop. Ever.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Apr 10, 2008 1:46 am BrikHaus wrote: He really dwarfs that prog knife. Best. Photoshop. Ever.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Apr 10, 2008 2:12 am You're hallucinating, Bee-Zerk. That's not a very good sign... On closer observation, the people in that photo are calmer than they should be if a 50-meter long-haired asian gentleman decided to stroll around their city.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Apr 10, 2008 2:28 am They should be calm though; they are lucky they don't have a Godzilla wrecking havoc through the city. And on even closer observation, that gentleman looks lost, and the stick thing he's holding reminds me of a compass. And it also reminds me that Ornette made a mini sized city of his own with mechanised/robot humans strolling around it.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Thu Apr 10, 2008 10:14 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: They should be calm though; they are lucky they don't have a Godzilla wrecking havoc through the city.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Apr 10, 2008 11:51 am Mine would be a giant Ornette.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Apr 10, 2008 6:36 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: And it also reminds me that Ornette made a mini sized city of his own with mechanised/robot humans strolling around it.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Apr 10, 2008 7:07 pm Ornette-kun, if you were a female, I just might wanna marry you

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 10, 2008 7:09 pm All this needs is his Time-Traveling Bike on one side and him holding a bottle of Whisky or two in the other. (As well as a whole 12-pack on the ground...) I needed a good chuckle. Thanks man! In terms of the name.... Whiskygouki? Ogouki? (as in O not 0.)

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Apr 11, 2008 2:12 am I would imagine a giant Reichu strolling through the city.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Apr 11, 2008 5:20 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: I would imagine a giant Reichu strolling through the city.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Fri Apr 11, 2008 9:33 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: I would imagine a giant Reichu strolling through the city.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 12, 2008 2:43 pm ....Needs MOAR GNO. Ogouki: He recharges his AT field with not just Yebisu, but Whisky, too! Now to arrange Ogouki versus Misatogelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Apr 12, 2008 2:44 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: ....Needs MOAR GNO.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sat Apr 12, 2008 2:50 pm lol...just 'shop tokpile and brik and.. WE ARE 200 PROOF!
